top_signals.title: AirPods Maker Luxshare Seeks Up to $3.1 Billion From Hong Kong Listing
top_signals.summary: Apple Inc. supplier Luxshare Precision Industry Co. has started taking investor orders for its Hong Kong listing that may fetch as much as HK$24.3 billion ($3.1 billion), the city’s biggest share debut so far this year.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Iran ratchets up talk of controlling Hormuz ahead of new talks
top_signals.summary: That stance will add to the pressure around the next round of talks, which the U.S. has said are set to take place in Qatar on Tuesday.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
